title: [Origin] Silly Alchemist
description: Brew chaos and spread glitter! A whimsical, high-mobility Origin featuring confetti explosions, fizzy splashes, and fuel-powered acrobatics. Who says chemistry has to be boring?
body:
### 🧪 The Silly Alchemist

*"Why brew boring potions when you can brew absolute chaos?"*

**The Silly Alchemist is a whimsical, high-mobility Origin for the Origins Mod. Eschewing the traditional laws of chemistry, this alchemist uses "Silly Fuel" to power explosive celebrations and gravity-defying stunts. If you want to turn the battlefield into a glittery playground, this is the Origin for you!**

# ✨ Features

**🎊 Confetti Explosion**

Who needs TNT? Release a vibrant burst of festive energy that knocks back nearby entities and covers the area in a shower of color. It’s the perfect way to make an entrance—or a very loud exit.

**🫧 Fizzy Splash**

Throw out a volatile, bubbling concoction! The Fizzy Splash creates a chaotic zone of effect, perfect for disrupting enemies or just making a mess.

**🍭 Silly Fuel**

The engine behind the madness. The Silly Alchemist runs on a unique resource called Silly Fuel. Keep your reserves high to maintain your chaotic edge—standard food just won't cut it for this level of silliness!

**🤸 Silly Acrobatics**

Gravity is more of a suggestion than a rule. With your fuel active, you gain access to enhanced movement, allowing you to leap, tumble, and bounce around your environment with ease.

**🎩 Particle Hat**

A true alchemist is never seen without their signature look. You sport a permanent, magical Particle Hat that emits a custom trail of effects, ensuring you remain the center of attention wherever you go.


## 🛠️ Technical Details

| Power Type | ID / Internal Name                 | Keybind | Description                      |
| ---------- | ---------------------------------- | ------- | -------------------------------- |
| Primary    | silly_alchemist:confetti_explosion | [G]     | Festive knockback & visual burst |
| Secondary  | silly_alchemist:fizzy_splash       | [H]     | Throwable bubbling projectile    |
| Resource   | silly_alchemist:silly_fuel         | Passive | Bar-based power resource         |
| Movement   | silly_alchemist:silly_acrobatics   | Passive | Jump boost & fall reduction      |
| Cosmetic   | silly_alchemist:particle_hat       | Passive | Custom particle emitter          |

### Requirements

    Origins Mod (Forge)

    Pehkui (Optional, but recommended for scaling effects)

    Minecraft 1.20.1

    Icon made by tianzart
